SEARCH
Package clientGui.user

Class BarcodeScannerController

java.lang.Object
clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator
clientGui.user.BarcodeScannerController
All Implemented Interfaces:
MessageListener<Object>, BaseController
public class BarcodeScannerController extends clientGui.navigation.MainNavigator implements MessageListener<Object>
Controller for the Barcode Scanner simulation screen. Simulates scanning a QR/Barcode to verify user presence/identity.
